en: Imagine if you were to have an intelligent sheep
ko: 만약 당신이 지능적인 양을 가질 수 있다면 상상해 보세요.

en: that can self-fold into any form it wants, any time.
ko: 원하는 어떤 형태로든, 언제든지 스스로 접을 수 있는 양이요.

en: And that's what I've been working on.
And I call this robotic origami, robogami.
ko: 저는 이걸 로봇 오리가미, 로보가미라고 부릅니다.

en: Ten years later, with my group of ninja origami robotic researchers,
ko: 10년 후, 저와 제 닌자 오리가미 로봇 연구팀과 함께,

en: we have a new generation of robogamis.
This one actually navigates through different terrains autonomously.
ko: 이 로보가미는 실제로 다양한 지형을 자율적으로 탐색합니다.

en: So when it's a dry and flat land, it crawls,
and if it meets a rough terrain, it starts rolling.
It's the same robot, but depending on which terrain it meets,
it activates a different sequence of actuators that's on board.
And once it meets an obstacle, it jumps over it.
It does this by storing an energy in each of its legs
and releasing it and catapulting like a slingshot.
For robogamis, there's no one fixed shape nor task.
They can transform into anything, anywhere, any time.
ko: 그들은 언제 어디서든 무엇이든 변형할 수 있습니다.
